name: Soupa Fasolakia Freska (Krema)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat half of the vegetable shortening in a large pot.
2. Sauté onions until light golden color.
3. Add beans, carrots, and parsley; sauté.
4. Add 10 cups of stock.
5. Cover and cook at a low boil until vegetables are tender (about 45 minutes).
6. Pass soup through a strainer or blender, then return to the pot.
7. In a smaller pot, heat remaining shortening.
8. Slowly add flour, stirring until well blended.
9. Add remaining hot broth and continue to stir until sauce thickens.
10. Season with salt and pepper.
11. Remove sauce from heat and swirl in butter.
12. Return bean puree to heat; bring to a quick boil.
13. Stir in the sauce.
14. Mix well and serve hot, with croutons if desired.
15. If soup is too thick, thin it by adding more hot broth.
